v1_items.proposed_pdf: D:/sbc_consultx/SBC 201 - The Saudi General Building Code-1-250.pdf
v1_items.rationale: Curated MD is TOC-line only. Section 309 body absent from extracted_sections.md and sbc201_sections_clean.json (5 keys, no 309).

v1_items.verbatim_quote_excerpt: 903.1 General. Automatic sprinkler systems shall comply with this section. Where the provisions of this code require...
v1_items.rationale: 903.1 verbatim present at extracted_sections.md:548; full canonical block already in curated MD.

v1_items.verbatim_quote_excerpt: 903.2 Where required. Approved automatic sprinkler systems in new buildings and structures shall be provided in the locations described in Sections 903.2.1 through 903.2.12.
v1_items.rationale: 903.2 lead-in verbatim at extracted_sections.md:560-563; merged in V1 build.

v1_items.verbatim_quote_excerpt: 903.2.7 Group M. An automatic sprinkler system shall be provided throughout buildings containing a Group M occupancy where one of the following conditions exists: 1. A Group M fire area exceeds 1115 m2.
v1_items.rationale: Verbatim Group M trigger thresholds (1115/2230 m2) at extracted_sections.md:869-883.

v1_items.verbatim_quote_excerpt: 903.2.7.1 High-piled storage. An automatic sprinkler system shall be provided as required in Chapter 32 in all buildings of Group M where storage of merchandise is in high-piled or rack storage arrays.
v1_items.rationale: High-piled storage clause verbatim at extracted_sections.md:885-890.

v1_items.verbatim_quote_excerpt: 903.2.7.2 Group M upholstered furniture or mattresses. An automatic sprinkler system shall be provided throughout a Group M fire area where the area used for the display and sale of upholstered furniture or mattresses exceeds 465 m2.
v1_items.rationale: Upholstered furniture/mattresses 465 m2 trigger verbatim at extracted_sections.md:892-897.

v1_items.verbatim_quote_excerpt: 907.1 General. This section covers the application, installation, performance and maintenance of fire alarm systems and their components in new and existing buildings and structures.
907.2 Where required—new buildings and structures... in accordance with Sections 907.2.1 through 907.2.23 and provide occupant notification...
v1_items.rationale: 907.2 lead-in verbatim at extracted_907_909.txt:186-191; merged in V1 build.

v1_items.verbatim_quote_excerpt: 907.2.7 Group M. A manual fire alarm system that activates the occupant notification system in accordance with Section 907.5 shall be installed in Group M occupancies where one of the following conditions exists: 1. The combined Group M occupant load of all floors is 500 or more persons.
v1_items.rationale: Group M alarm 500/100-persons thresholds verbatim at extracted_907_909.txt:1312-1386 incl. exceptions.

v1_items.verbatim_quote_excerpt: 907.2.7.1 Occupant notification. During times that the building is occupied, the initiation of a signal from a manual fire alarm box or from a waterflow switch shall not be required to activate the alarm notification appliances when an alarm signal is activated at a constantly attended location.
v1_items.rationale: Occupant-notification EV/ACS clause verbatim at extracted_907_909.txt:1387-1409.
